name: software-engineering-large
description: Full software engineering team with architecture, DevEx, and documentation specialists

agents.name: Code Reviewer
agents.goal: Review code for correctness, performance, and maintainability

agents.name: Software Architect
agents.goal: Design scalable system architecture and evaluate trade-offs

agents.name: Tech Lead
agents.goal: Coordinate technical direction and unblock the team

agents.goal: Improve build systems, CI pipelines, and developer tooling

agents.name: Technical Writer
agents.goal: Write and maintain API documentation, guides, and changelogs
